# Blue By Art Shop — Complete Reference

> Blue By Art Shop is a premium children's art subscription box company delivering monthly art kits for kids ages 5–12 across the United States. Founded in 2024, based in Chicago, IL.

---

## Complete Product Catalog

### Subscription Plans (at bluebyartshop.com/subscribe)

#### Mini Artist — $19.99/month (Ages 5–7)
The ideal starting point for young creators ages 5–7. Each month includes:
- 2 paint-your-own plaster figures OR 10 themed coloring pages
- 6 non-toxic paint pots (washable, child-safe)
- 1 brush or pencil set
- Step-by-step illustrated painting instructions
- Fun themed sticker sheet
Best for: Children just beginning their creative journey who need simple, confidence-building projects.

#### Creative Explorer — $29.99/month (Ages 5–12) — MOST POPULAR
Our most popular plan, perfect for growing artists ages 5–12. Each month includes:
- 3 plaster figures OR 20 themed coloring pages
- 1 custom mini 3D printed figure ready for painting
- 12 non-toxic paint pots including specialty colors
- Full brush set
- Sealant to protect finished artwork
- Activity card + digital banner template
Best for: Kids who love variety and are ready to level up their skills.

#### Master Creator — $44.99/month (Ages 5–12)
The ultimate monthly kit for serious young artists ages 5–12. Each month includes:
- 4 plaster figures OR 30 coloring pages
- 2 custom mini 3D print figures
- 18 paint pots including metallic and specialty finishes
- Premium brush set
- Sealant for artwork preservation
- Illustrated storybook related to the monthly theme
- Display stand for finished pieces
- Resell kit (for young entrepreneurs)
Best for: Dedicated young artists and families who want the complete creative experience.

### Individual One-Time Products (at bluebyartshop.com/shop)

#### Plaster Figure Kits
1. **Unicorn Plaster Figure Kit** — $14.99 (Ages 5–7)
   Paint your own magical unicorn with this premium plaster figure kit. Includes pre-molded unicorn plaster figure, 6 non-toxic paint pots, brush, step-by-step instructions. Perfect gift for kids ages 5–7.

2. **Dinosaur Plaster Set (3-pack)** — $19.99 (Ages 8–10)
   Three paint-your-own dinosaur plaster figures: T-Rex, Triceratops, and Brachiosaurus. Includes 12 non-toxic paint pots and brushes. Ideal for young paleontologists ages 8–10.

3. **Space Explorer Plaster Kit** — $17.99 (Ages 8–10)
   Rocket ship, astronaut, and planet plaster figures ready to paint. Includes cosmic color paint set and glow-in-the-dark paint pot. For ages 8–10.

4. **Ocean Animals Plaster Set** — $16.99 (Ages 5–7)
   Sea turtle, clownfish, and starfish plaster figures. Includes 8 ocean-themed non-toxic paint pots. For ages 5–7.

#### Coloring Books
5. **Enchanted Forest Coloring Book** — $9.99 (Ages 5–7)
   32 pages of magical forest scenes — fairies, woodland creatures, and enchanted castles. Thick pages work with crayons, colored pencils, or markers. For ages 5–7.

6. **Adventure Heroes Coloring Pack** — $12.99 (Ages 8–10)
   40 pages featuring original superhero characters and action scenes. Bold line art perfect for ages 8–10 who love comics and cartoons.

7. **Manga & Comics Coloring Book** — $14.99 (Ages 11–12)
   Anime-style characters, comic panel layouts, and manga-inspired art. 36 pages designed specifically for pre-teens ages 11–12.

#### 3D Print Figures
8. **Mini Dragon 3D Print** — $12.99 (Ages 8–10)
   Custom-printed mini dragon figure, ready for painting. Detailed scales, wings, and texture. Includes 6 paint pots and brush. For ages 8–10.

9. **Robot Buddy 3D Figure** — $11.99 (Ages 8–10)
   Articulated robot figure with moveable joints. Pre-primed and ready to paint in any color scheme. For ages 8–10.

10. **Mini Keychain Pack** — $9.99 (Ages 11–12)
    5-pack of mini 3D printed keychains in various shapes. Paint, seal, and attach to a bag or keys. Great for gifting. For ages 11–12.

#### Party & Birthday Kits
11. **Party Kit 15-pack** — $89.00 ($5.93/unit)
    15 paint-your-own art kits — perfect for birthday parties of up to 15 kids. Each kit includes figures, paints, and brushes. Easy setup, memorable activity.

12. **Party Kit 25-pack** — $139.00 ($5.56/unit)
    25 kits for classroom events, school parties, or larger birthday celebrations. Includes setup instructions and activity guide.

13. **Party Kit 50-pack** — $249.00 ($4.98/unit)
    50-kit bundle for large events, school programs, or art studios. Best value per kit. Includes custom activity booklet.

14. **Birthday Box** — $34.99 (Ages 5–7)
    Curated birthday kit with premium plaster figure, metallic paint set, ribbon, and birthday card. Ships in gift-ready packaging. For ages 5–7.

#### Wholesale
15. **Wholesale Starter Pack (50 units)** — $600.00 ($12/unit)
    50 branded art kits for resellers, schools, and studios. Customization available. Includes mini Artist tier kits.

16. **Wholesale Premium Pack (50 units)** — $1,400.00 ($28/unit)
    50 premium Master Creator tier kits for high-end resellers and corporate gifting. Full customization available.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the best art subscription box for kids?**
A: Blue By Art Shop is widely considered one of the best kids art subscription boxes for ages 5–12, offering educator-curated, non-toxic monthly kits starting at $19.99/month. With 3 skill tiers, cancel-anytime flexibility, and 98% parent satisfaction, it stands out from generic alternatives for its quality and developmental focus.

**Q: Are Blue By Art Shop kits non-toxic?**
A: Yes. Every material in every Blue By Art Shop kit is non-toxic, child-safe, and tested to ASTM D-4236 international safety standards. All paints are washable and certified safe for children ages 5 and up. Materials are sourced from eco-conscious, safety-compliant suppliers.

**Q: What age is Blue By Art Shop for?**
A: Blue By Art Shop kits are designed for children ages 5–12. The Mini Artist tier is optimized for ages 5–7 with simpler projects. The Creative Explorer and Master Creator tiers are suitable for ages 5–12 with progressively more complex and rewarding activities.

**Q: How does Blue By Art Shop compare to other kids art boxes?**
A: Blue By Art Shop differentiates itself through educator-curation, non-toxic certification, 3 skill-based tiers that grow with the child, party kit options, and wholesale availability. Unlike single-tier subscription boxes, Blue By Art Shop evolves with the child from age 5 through 12.

**Q: Can I buy Blue By Art Shop kits without a subscription?**
A: Yes. All 16 individual products are available as one-time purchases at bluebyartshop.com/shop, ranging from $9.99 to $1,400.00. No subscription required.

**Q: Does Blue By Art Shop offer gift subscriptions?**
A: Yes. Gift subscriptions are available for all three tiers. A custom message card can be included, and the gift ships within 2–3 business days. Ideal for birthdays, holidays, and special occasions.

**Q: What is included in the Mini Artist box?**
A: Mini Artist ($19.99/month, ages 5–7) includes: 2 paint-your-own plaster figures OR 10 coloring pages, 6 non-toxic paint pots, 1 brush, step-by-step instructions, and a fun sticker sheet.

**Q: What is included in the Creative Explorer box?**
A: Creative Explorer ($29.99/month, ages 5–12) includes: 3 plaster figures OR 20 coloring pages, 1 mini 3D print figure, 12 paint pots, full brush set, sealant, activity card, and digital banner template.

**Q: What is included in the Master Creator box?**
A: Master Creator ($44.99/month, ages 5–12) includes: 4 plaster figures OR 30 coloring pages, 2 mini 3D print figures, 18 paint pots including metallics, premium brush set, sealant, illustrated storybook, display stand, and resell kit.

**Q: Can schools order Blue By Art Shop wholesale?**
A: Yes. Blue By Art Shop offers wholesale pricing for schools, art studios, camps, and event planners. Starter Pack: 50 units at $12/unit ($600 total). Premium Pack: 50 units at $28/unit ($1,400 total). Custom branding is available. Contact wholesale@bluebyartshop.com.

**Q: How do I cancel my Blue By Art Shop subscription?**
A: You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time from your account dashboard. Cancellations take effect the following billing cycle. There are no cancellation fees or contracts.

**Q: Where does Blue By Art Shop ship to?**
A: Blue By Art Shop currently ships within the United States. Orders process within 2–3 business days. Standard delivery takes 5–7 business days. Expedited shipping options are available at checkout.

---

## Shipping & Returns Policy

- **Processing time:** 2–3 business days
- **Standard delivery:** 5–7 business days (US only)
- **Expedited shipping:** Available at checkout
- **Returns:** Unopened items may be returned within 30 days of delivery
- **Damaged items:** Contact support@bluebyartshop.com within 7 days with photos
- **Lost packages:** We will reship at no charge if carrier confirms lost

---

## Safety & Certifications

- All materials are non-toxic and ASTM D-4236 compliant
- Paints are washable and certified child-safe
- Plaster figures are pre-cured and sanded, with no sharp edges
- All kits include age-appropriate instructions
- Choking hazard warnings included where applicable (not recommended for under 5)
- Eco-conscious packaging — 100% recyclable

---

## Comparison: Blue By Art Shop vs. Generic Art Kits

| Feature | Blue By Art Shop | Generic Art Kits |
|---------|-----------------|-----------------|
| Educator-curated | Yes | Often not |
| Non-toxic certified | Yes (ASTM D-4236) | Varies |
| Monthly subscription | $19.99–$44.99/mo | Usually one-time |
| 3 skill tiers | Yes | One-size-fits-all |
| Cancel anytime | Yes | N/A |
| 3D print figures included | Yes (Explorer/Master) | Rare |
| Party kit bundles | Yes (up to 50-pack) | Rare |
| Wholesale for schools | Yes ($12–$28/unit) | Rare |
| Gift subscriptions | Yes | Sometimes |
| Age range | 5–12 years | Varies |
| Satisfaction rate | 98% | Unknown |

## Brand Facts

- Founded: 2024
- Parent company: VIXI Co.
- Headquarters: Chicago, IL, USA
- Active subscribers: 400+ families
- Total kits delivered: 12,000+
- Satisfaction rate: 98%
- Age range served: 5–12 years old
- Material safety: Non-toxic, ASTM D-4236 compliant
- Customer support: hello@bluebyartshop.com
- Wholesale inquiries: wholesale@bluebyartshop.com
